g.text: Anatomy of a BFF — five responsibility layers, one client request, seven internal calls
The client sees one request and one response. Behind the BFF: parallel fan-out, shape translation, auth swap, protocol switch.
owned by the iOS team • deployed with the app
JSON over HTTP/2 • client-tailored timeouts & retries
Fan out 7 downstream calls in parallel; await all
Drop unused fields, flatten nesting, rename per client convention
Compose JSON • compress • add cache headers
Anchor: 1 client request → 7 parallel internal calls → 1 response (~2 KB)
Forbidden inside the BFF: business logic, durable state, source-of-truth ownership. Strip them out — BFF is translation only.
